{"verdict":"request_changes","summary":"The substantive file/module documentation is present, but a public result advertised as a main result is missing its own docstring.","findings":[{"file":"TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck.lean","line":56,"issue":"`Deck.proj_smul` is listed in the module docstring under main results, but the public theorem itself has no docstring.","fix":"Add a docstring on `Deck.proj_smul` explaining that deck transformations preserve the projection, e.g. `p (h • e) = p e`.","evidence":"Diff shows `* Deck.proj_smul`: deck transformations commute with `p` in the module docstring, followed by undocumented declaration `theorem proj_smul (h : Deck p) (e : E) : p (h • e) = p e := ...`."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: The substantive file/module documentation is present, but a public result advertised as a main result is missing its own docstring.

findings.issue: `Deck.proj_smul` is listed in the module docstring under main results, but the public theorem itself has no docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring on `Deck.proj_smul` explaining that deck transformations preserve the projection, e.g. `p (h • e) = p e`.
findings.evidence: Diff shows `* Deck.proj_smul`: deck transformations commute with `p` in the module docstring, followed by undocumented declaration `theorem proj_smul (h : Deck p) (e : E) : p (h • e) = p e := ...`.
